58483197.name: SA-25 Steel Trooper
58483197.description: For optimal performance, the manufacturer recommends avoiding immersing this armor in salt water for prolonged periods.

267424901.name: I-102 Draconaught
267424901.description: Completely sheathed in 14-cm silica fiber foam, except for a thin tube to the ear canal to enable hearing the satisfying screeches of Freedom's enemies as they burn.

325695835.name: B-01 Tactical
325695835.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

470325800.name: TR-40 Gold Eagle
470325800.description: This high-visibility armor allows it's bearer to be easily seen through smoke, fog, and spewing viscera.

476841466.name: CM-09 Bonesnapper
476841466.description: Based on a colonial surgeon's gown, where surgeries were often interrupted by a need to perform defensive duties.

487470129.name: B-01 Tactical
487470129.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

600891740.name: PH-56 Jaguar
600891740.description: 'Prowl like a jaguar, strike like a viper.'—Motto of the storied SEAF special operations unit whose real exploits were portrayed in the classic comic book series 'Tales of the Viper Commandos.'

618911418.name: EX-03 Prototype 3
618911418.description: Because this prototype's wires operate at 400,000 volts, it also includes a handy rubber underlayer for insulation.

621795009.name: B-01 Tactical
621795009.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

622973953.name: UF-84 Doubt Killer
622973953.description: Developed by the Ministry of Science while investigating the phenomenon known as The Gloom, this armor is non-permeable and squeak resistant.

627197346.name: CE-35 Trench Engineer
627197346.description: After colonists of Hellmire recovered a lost shipment of this armor, the local pastime of fence-smashing was born.

726539469.name: CM-09 Bonesnapper
726539469.description: Based on a colonial surgeon's gown, where surgeries were often interrupted by a need to perform defensive duties

950673533.name: CM-14 Physician
950673533.description: The distinctive red, white, and green of the Intergalactic Medical Corps signal to all Helldivers that help is at hand.

996716618.name: AF-02 Haz-Master
996716618.description: Developed by the Ministry of Science while investigating the phenomenon known as The Gloom, this armor is non-permeable and squeak resistant.

1058794522.name: DP-00 Tactical
1058794522.description: This classic armour set is recognised by every citizen: worn by the heroic Helldivers who battled and forever defeated the Terminids, Cyborgs, and the Illuminate in the First Galactic War

1223759745.name: EX-16 Prototype 16
1223759745.description: As the electric arc generates a strong magnetic field, wearers should avoid use while in the vicinity of stapled paperwork

1333768893.name: B-01 Tactical
1333768893.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

1335058381.name: CW-9 White Wolf
1335058381.description: The pattern used for this armor is the result of the Winter Camouflage Improvement Effort, which considered 136 entrants before determining the color white would best blend in with snow.

1558906438.name: CM-06 Combat Medic
1558906438.description: This armor was designed by PFC Rodney A. Carmichael, the first Helldiver to use a stim on an ally instead of himself.

1639126819.name: B-01 Tactical
1639126819.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

1666296234.name: B-01 Tactical
1666296234.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

1887719913.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

2047279903.name: CM-10 Clinician
2047279903.description: Featuring patented reverse-seam technology, to reduce the likelihood of bodily fluids entering the armor's interior.

2076005753.name: DP-40 Hero of the Federation
2076005753.description: Though originally intended solely for ceremonial use, its inspirational energy proved equally useful on the battlefield.

2128569605.name: CE-27 Ground Breaker
2128569605.description: 'The ground is just another obstacle that hasn't yet been cleared.' - SGM Janet Jones, Excavation Corps Founder.

2150790862.name: B-24 Enforcer
2150790862.description: In field tests, 84% of users said that the armor improved their posture and self-esteem.

2325051543.name: TR-7 Ambassador of the Brand
2325051543.description: Promotional armor made by SUMY Corp. as part of a highly successful marketing campaign for frozen yogurt.

2342442877.name: B-24 Enforcer
2342442877.description: In field tests, 84% of users said that the armor improved their posture and self-esteem.

2346212818.name: FS-34 Exterminator
2346212818.description: Features a patented non-stick coating, which makes scraping viscera off after a long day of battle less taxing.

2396807401.name: SA-04 Combat Technician
2396807401.description: Due to the enhanced strength caused by this armor, caution is advised when using door handles or embracing colleagues.

2483492566.name: TR-9 Cavalier of Democracy
2483492566.description: Bearers of this armor ride no equine mount, but are nonetheless borne to battle atop the trusty steed of Liberty.

2546928266.name: CE-81 Juggernaut
2546928266.description: One of the most durable engineer armors available, each set is quality tested by an impact with a full-grown Charger.

2675118910.name: TR-117 Alpha Commander
2675118910.description: For warriors who are so strong and confident that they don't need any reassurance whatsoever.

2855449476.name: EX-16 Prototype 16
2855449476.description: As the electric arc generates a strong magnetic field, wearers should avoid use while in vicinity of stapled paperwork.

2858087169.name: SA-12 Servo Assisted
2858087169.description: Each servo-assisted limb contains 138 miniature motors, to support a natural gait and long-term spinal health.

2886393549.name: B-24 Enforcer
2886393549.description: In field tests, 84% of users said that the armor improved their posture and self-esteem.

2948747084.name: DP-11 Champion of the People
2948747084.description: The three stripes on the pauldrons stand for the three principles of Super Earth: Liberty, Democracy, and Prosperity.

3008695584.name: UF-50 Bloodhound
3008695584.description: Users are advised not to scratch at the lacquer, as the Red 20,000 pigment that gives this armor its signature sheen may be correlated with rapid DNA unspooling.

3037986132.name: DP-40 Hero of the Federation
3037986132.description: Though originally intended solely for ceremonial use, its inspirational energy proved equally useful on the battlefield.

3059832618.name: UF-16 Inspector
3059832618.description: Made famous by the "Truth Enforcers: Enforcers of Truth" mystery novels, this armor calls to mind those paragons of patriotism who protect us from treasonous lies.

3386027321.name: SA-04 Combat Technician
3386027321.description: Due to the enhanced strength caused by this armor, caution is advised when using door handles or embracing colleagues.

3583338197.description: This armor is the Super Earth Standard Issue, made from the same titanium alloy as the Destroyer's hull.

3672418116.description: For optimal performance, the manufacturer recommends avoiding immersing this armor in salt water for prolonged periods.

3819612061.name: DP-11 Champion of the People
3819612061.description: The three stripes on the pauldrons stand for the three principles of Super Earth: Liberty, Democracy, and Prosperity.

3990548579.name: I-92 Fire Fighter
3990548579.description: The heavy rubber tunic and reflective limb guards, originally designed to save citizens from burning buildings, now enable the liberal application of the cleansing fires of Justice.

4072133621.description: Each servo-assisted limb contains 138 miniature motors, to support a natural gait and long-term spinal health.

4118634958.name: SC-15 Drone Master
4118634958.description: Some soldiers report picking up strange radio interference when wearing this armor near alien artifacts.

4216001108.name: CE-35 Trench Engineer
4216001108.description: After colonists of Hellmire recovered a lost shipment of this armor, the local pastime of fence-smashing was born.

4249185760.name: DP-53 Savior of the Free
4249185760.description: A faithful replica of the armor worn at The Battle of Liberty Peak. Honor their legacy, and wear it with pride.
